name: New Prime Inc. v. Oliveira
summary: The Supreme Court unanimously held that the FAA's Section 1 exemption covers contracts with independent contractors who perform transportation work, not just traditional employment contracts, and that courts—not arbitrators—must decide whether the exemption applies.
significance: Established that the Section 1 exemption applies to independent contractors as well as employees, directly relevant because Brock was classified as an independent contractor by Flower Foods.
